description_long: This object is a stylized chainsaw with a unique design, featuring a long, curved wooden handle and a prominent metallic body. At the front, a large propeller-like blade assembly replaces the traditional chainsaw chain, suggesting a hybrid or fantasy-inspired tool. The body is primarily green with metallic and brown accents, and several mechanical components, such as a motor housing, are visible along the length. The handle appears to be ergonomically shaped, with a hook at the rear end and additional grip features. There are visible brackets, levers, and a possible trigger mechanism near the handle, indicating interactive parts. The overall construction combines wood, metal, and plastic, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance suitable for urban or post-apocalyptic scenarios.
description: A stylized chainsaw with a curved wooden handle, green metallic body, and a large propeller blade at the front. The design blends wood, metal, and plastic for a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the chainsaw, highlighting the curved wooden handle, green body, and large front propeller blade.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the propeller blade and the symmetrical arrangement of the handle and body components.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the handle's curvature and mechanical details along the body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle, the hook feature, and the alignment of the body components.
attribute_handle_design: Single long, curved wooden handle with ergonomic shaping and a hook at the rear; includes a secondary grip area and possible anti-vibration features.
